description: The RandomObjectSpawner component selects a slot from the ``Templates`` list, and spawns it either at this component's parent (in the case of ``Spawn()``), or at the point specified in an argument (in the case of ``SpawnAtPoint()``)

fields.Templates: List of slots to be selected from, when a Trigger is invoked
fields.SpawnSpace: The coordinate space in which the template item will be spawned.

methods.Spawn: Spawns a slot randomly selected from ``Templates``, located at the origin of this component's parent slot.
methods.SpawnAtPoint: Spawns a slot randomly selected from ``Templates``, located at the provided point.

notes.title: Behavior
notes.text:
When triggered by any event source that accepts an Action (for ``Spawn()``), or Action (for ``SpawnAtPoint()``, this component will spawn a random slot from ``Templates``

Prior to Build 2020.11.8.605, this component would duplicate a random slot from ``Templates`` in-place, without changing its location.
